name: Mattermost
compose:
name: slashnode-mattermost
services:
  app:
    image: alexlack/mattermost-app:v11.8.1
    container_name: mattermost-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      MM_USERNAME: admin
      MM_PASSWORD: admin
      MM_DBNAME: mattermost
      MM_SQLSETTINGS_DATASOURCE: postgres://admin:admin@mattermost-db:5432/mattermost?sslmode=disable&connect_timeout=10
    volumes:
      - app_data-app-mattermost-config:/mattermost/config:rw
      - app_data-app-mattermost-data:/mattermost/data:rw
      - app_data-app-mattermost-logs:/mattermost/logs:rw
      - app_data-app-mattermost-plugins:/mattermost/plugins:rw
      - app_data-app-mattermost-client-plugins:/mattermost/client/plugins:rw
      - /etc/localtime:/etc/localtime:ro
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8765:8000
  db:
    image: alexlack/mattermost-db:v11.8.1
    container_name: mattermost-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      MM_USERNAME: admin
      MM_PASSWORD: admin
      MM_DBNAME: mattermost
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/postgresql/data
      - /etc/localtime:/etc/localtime:ro
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-app-mattermost-config:
    name: slashnode-mattermost_app_data-app-mattermost-config
  app_data-app-mattermost-data:
    name: slashnode-mattermost_app_data-app-mattermost-data
  app_data-app-mattermost-logs:
    name: slashnode-mattermost_app_data-app-mattermost-logs
  app_data-app-mattermost-plugins:
    name: slashnode-mattermost_app_data-app-mattermost-plugins
  app_data-app-mattermost-client-plugins:
    name: slashnode-mattermost_app_data-app-mattermost-client-plugins
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-mattermost_db_data-db
